title: bromus mollis f. nanus
intro: Bromus mollis f. nanus, also known as a dwarf meadow brome or dwarf soft brome, is a small-grass species in the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Bromus mollis f. nanus include its ability to soothe coughs, treat bronchitis, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
